title: JJSH
description: An addon that adds techniques and various features to Orca's mod.
body:
JJSH - Jujutsu Craft Addon

JJSH is an addon for Orca's mod, Jujutsu Craft (Sorcery Fight).
This addon uses some assets from Orca's mod.

Features

Black Flash Enhancement
Triggering a Black Flash will permanently increase your strength.

Water Walking Item
Walk on water using a special item.
This item can be obtained from structure chests.

Love Rendezvous Technique
Adds Love Rendezvous, the technique of Kirara Hoshi.
You can obtain this technique using the JJSH Technique Changer.

Sukuna Combo Book
Added a Sukuna Combo Book that allows you to use combo skills without consuming Sukuna's fingers.

Air Jump Item
Added an item that allows you to jump in mid-air when used.

Domain Rank System
Adds a domain ranking system.

Incomplete Domain
If the sorcerer rank is Grade 2 or lower, using a domain will result in an incomplete domain.

Open Barrier Domain
Allows the use of an open barrier domain when the Domain Mastery skill is unlocked.
Hold Shift while using it to activate a normal (closed) domain instead.

Damage Display
Shows damage dealt to enemies in real-time.

Commands

/fame
Displays your current fame.

/playerlevel
Displays your current player level.

/black flash stack
Displays the current damage increase from Black Flash.

Gamerule

/gamerule blackflashstack
Enables or disables the Black Flash enhancement effect.

/gamerule jjshDamageDisplay
Enables or disables the damage display feature.

/gamerule jjshOpenBarrierDomain
Allows open barrier domain when Domain Mastery is achieved.
If disabled, only closed domains and incomplete domains will be applied.

More Coming Soon

Additional features I have planned will be added in future updates.
